remarks: Stylish, impeccably maintained 1BR/1BA condo at The Biltmore, downtown Stamford's coveted full-service luxury tower. This warm and inviting residence offers a smart, open layout with engineered hardwood floors, an updated kitchen with granite counters and breakfast bar, and a sun-filled living/dining area ideal for comfortable everyday living. The bedroom features a large walk-in closet and access to an updated double-entry bathroom. Additional highlights include central air, excellent natural light from a full wall of windows, and the rare convenience of an IN-UNIT WASHER/DRYER. With 557 square feet of thoughtfully designed space, this home lives larger than its footprint and reflects years of meticulous care by the same owner. Residents of The Biltmore enjoy 24-hour concierge service, a well-equipped fitness center, available FIBER OPTIC INTERNET, shuttle to Metro-North, elegant community room/lounge, unique 4th-floor landscaped courtyard, dry-cleaning services, and pet-friendly policy. Monthly and guest parking available at the adjoining parking lot (Propark). Perfectly positioned in the heart of Downtown Stamford, a short walk to Bedford and Summer Streets' vital dining and shopping area, Metro-North, and Pickleball America - one of the largest indoor venues in the country. Also, easy access to I-95 and the Stamford Transportation Center. A perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and full-service amenities in one of Stamford's most desirable condominium buildings.
